caption: A man wearing glasses, a grey wig with a peaked top, a white dress shirt with suspenders, and a red bow tie sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. Behind him, a wall is decorated with several framed photographs. To his right, a clothing rack holds various garments, including a shirt labeled "LEE." Red and white logos are superimposed on the scene, featuring the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" alongside a graphic of a microphone. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and continues speaking. In the final frame, he lifts his left hand to gesture while talking. The background remains static, and the lighting is consistent across the entire scene.
